headline: Morgan Stanley launches AI @ Debrief — OpenAI-powered meeting notes tool saves advisors 30 minutes per client meeting
the_so_what: The gap between Morgan Stanley's 98% adoption and the industry median is no longer a technology lead — it is a compounding data advantage where each interaction trains the next recommendation, and the 30 minutes saved per meeting across thousands of advisors aggregates into a structural cost-to-serve advantage that widens with every client conversation.
summary: Morgan Stanley launched AI @ Debrief on June 26, 2024 — an OpenAI-powered tool (Whisper + GPT-4) that records and transcribes Zoom meetings with client consent, then auto-generates meeting notes saved directly into Salesforce and a draft follow-up email surfacing action items. Advisors report saving approximately 30 minutes of administrative work per client meeting. Morgan Stanley is OpenAI's only wealth management strategic partner, a relationship established in March 2023. The broader AI @ Morgan Stanley Assistant, launched in September 2023, had already reached 98% adoption among advisor teams by the time Debrief launched.

key_stat.label: Saved per client meeting on admin — Morgan Stanley AI @ Debrief
